common.ctaHeading: [ES] Ready for the right next step?
common.ctaBody: [ES] Send us a message and we'll help you get started.

spanish.title: [ES] Florida driving help in Spanish
spanish.subtitle: [ES] From your first permit to handling a ticket, we explain Florida's steps in Spanish and support you over WhatsApp. Educational guidance and approved-provider connections — no outcome is guaranteed.

permit.title: [ES] Prepare for the Florida permit exam with confidence
permit.subtitle: [ES] Practice questions, road-sign drills, and clear explanations for the Class E knowledge exam — in English and Spanish. This is educational prep, not the official exam.

ticket.title: [ES] Got a traffic ticket? Understand your options first.
ticket.subtitle: [ES] We explain the Basic Driver Improvement (BDI) path and your next steps. Eligibility and any effect on points are decided by the court or clerk — always follow the instructions you received.
